description: Template files for local business website scaffold

configFiles.description: Astro 5 configuration with Tailwind CSS v4, sitemap, and optional Cloudflare adapter
Node.js package manifest with Astro 5, Tailwind v4, and all required dependencies
Global CSS with Tailwind v4 imports, custom fonts, color tokens, and utility classes

dataTemplates.description: Core business configuration: name, phone, email, address, hours, schema.org type, social links. Agent generates this from user input.
Array of service areas with slug, name, county, coordinates, and nearby areas for internal linking. Agent generates from user-provided locations.
Array of services offered with slug, name, shortDescription, icon identifier, and related services. Agent generates from user-provided services.

SEO content maps keyed by area-service combination. Includes page titles, meta descriptions, H1 headings, intro paragraphs, FAQ arrays, and testimonials. Agent generates unique content for each combination.

reusableFiles.description: TypeScript configuration extending Astro strict preset
Astro 5 content collection schemas for blog posts
URL builder helpers for service pages, area pages, and blog posts
Root HTML layout with SEO head, header, footer, and slot
SEO head component with meta tags, Open Graph, canonical URL, and JSON-LD schema
Responsive site header with navigation, mobile menu, and CTA button
Site footer with service area links, service links, contact info, and copyright
Breadcrumb navigation with schema.org BreadcrumbList markup
FAQ accordion section with schema.org FAQPage markup
Internal linking grid showing related service-area pages
Service areas grid section for linking to all area pages
Customer testimonials section with schema.org Review markup
Homepage with hero, services overview, areas grid, testimonials, and CTA
About page with business story, team, values, and trust signals
Contact page with form, map embed placeholder, phone/email, and hours
Services directory listing all service types with descriptions
Individual service page with getStaticPaths from serviceTypes data
Programmatic service-area combination page, the core SEO page type
Service areas directory listing all locations served
Individual area page with getStaticPaths from serviceAreas data
Blog listing page pulling from content collections
Individual blog post page with content collection rendering

placeholders.__SITE_URL__: Full website URL with https:// (e.g., https://www.austinplumbing.com)
placeholders.__PROJECT_SLUG__: Kebab-case project name for package.json (e.g., austin-plumbing-pros)
placeholders.__PRIMARY_COLOR__: Primary brand color as HSL values for Tailwind CSS v4 theme tokens (e.g., 142 52% 28%)
placeholders.__ACCENT_COLOR__: Accent/CTA color as HSL values for Tailwind CSS v4 theme tokens (e.g., 35 92% 50%)
